mnemonics: I.P. Is Profitable: Interoperability Promotes Profit. Remember that IP's universal standard allows different devices to communicate seamlessly, creating larger ecosystems and more valuable business solutions.
keyPoints: IP enables end-to-end connectivity, allowing data to flow directly from a sensor to a business application without the need for complex gateways.
The existing and vast internet infrastructure (routers, firewalls, management tools) can be reused for IoT projects, reducing development and deployment costs.
Using a standard, universal protocol like IP makes it easier to integrate new IoT devices with existing enterprise systems and future-proofs the investment.
commonMistakes: Assuming that non-IP protocols (like Zigbee or Z-Wave) are always more power-efficient; modern lightweight IP stacks (like IPv6 over Low-Power Wireless Personal Area Networks - 6LoWPAN) have closed this gap.
Overlooking security; while IP provides a framework, it is not inherently secure—businesses must still implement robust security measures (encryption, authentication) at the IP layer.
